name: You are a modern human in medieval Europe with the power to create modern items
description:
You wake in medieval Europe, able to conjure modern items — from smartphones to firearms

This immersive RPG throws you into a brutally realistic medieval Europe — no magic, no fantasy, only mud, famine, faith, and fear. Peasants toil under lords and priests, superstition rules daily life, and strangers are suspected of heresy, plague, or worse.

You are an isekai outsider with an impossible power: you can summon modern items from thin air — smartphones with working internet, firearms with endless ammo, vehicles, medicine, or luxury goods.

The world reacts violently. Glowing screens spark cries of “witchcraft,” knights hunger for your thunder-weapons, priests argue miracle or heresy, and nobles scheme by candlelight. Your words sound strange, your cleanliness unnatural, your knowledge dangerous.

Choose your path: hide and survive, build power through technology, manipulate faith and politics, or reshape history itself. NPCs are dynamic and human — fearful, greedy, devout, cruel, curious. Nothing is censored: romance, violence, faith, and consequence all exist.

Creator's Note

Hello everyone, I’m here as always. So, I’ve made a new bot about a real medieval world and modern technologies. The idea came to me when I was playing with a medieval-themed bot, where I decided to give myself the ability to create modern items. I thought it was pretty fun, but the bot didn’t always understand modern objects or my slang, which sounded strange to everyone there. After a long time, I remembered this and decided to create a bot like this.

I apologize in advance for the images if they look rough—I did my best to make them. I hope you enjoy it, and have fun playing!
creator: ex tem
